title: Verify Locked State Content in Trial Corner
description: Test that for a user with a paused or cancelled trial, the content sections in the Trial Corner are visually locked and non-interactive.
preconditions: User has previously cancelled their trial via the Trial Corner flow.

steps.description: 1. Log in as the user and navigate to the homepage.
2. Click the 'Cancelled' state widget to enter the Trial Corner.
4. Verify these sections have a visual overlay (e.g., a lock icon, greyed out) indicating they are inaccessible.
5. Attempt to click on any content within these sections.

expected_result: All content sections are visually locked and clicking them has no effect or prompts the user to re-subscribe. The 'Manage Trial' section remains active.
